1 I 0

7 OR 01

Applying to 01001110
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 7 = 0
1 I 0 = 0
2 I 1 = 1
3 I 2 = 0
4 I 3 = 0
5 I 4 = 1
6 I 5 = 1
7 OR 01 = OR(I 0,I 1) = OR(0,1) = 1

\boxed{00100111}
